titleStmt.title: SII 10.751: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 751. (A.R. No. 541 of 1909.) ON A SLAB NEAR THE DURGA TEMPLE ON THE HILL, AMĪNABĀD, SATTENAPALLI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1514. (Nandana)

summary.p: Records that, during the reign of Muhammad Quli Pādshāh, certain persons rebelled against the king and that his general Malka Amī[n] suppressed the rebellion and restored order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivā
hanaśakavarṣaṁbu lagu 1514 Agu nēṁ
ṭi naṁddanasaṁvatsara . vaiśākha śu 3 guruvāraṁ su ...
tisainutissāmiyā cā māhē savvālusana Alaphu 1000
ku Agu nēṁḍu mōtimadapulatulaAliyu talalaAliyā
Analatanatala Ayālatula bāhirāmalka Amīmalakavoḍayalu
gāru cēśina pratāpadharmaśāsanakrama meṭlannanu modalanu śālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁbu lagu 1502 Agu nēṁḍu vikramasaṁvatsara caitra
bhavumavāraṁnāṁḍu hajarati yibhurāhiṁ pādaśā
ha voḍayaluṁgāru tama nāmajādu Aṁppi tēsu dhāṭiga
nēṁgi vuddagiri dārkkoni vēṁkkaṭarājuṁ dōli muṁgōṭalu laggavaṭṭivini
koṁḍḍayu bellamukoṁḍḍa taṁggeḍal pāṭaparin hariṁcci mari balmini gaiko
ne koṁḍḍavīḍu karnāṭakarājadhāni yibhurāmuṁḍu bāhubalaṁbu
mīrucūnu . 1yīlāgu pratāpāna koṁḍḍavīṭirājyaṁ puccukoni rā
jyaṁ pratipāliṁstunnu vuṁḍḍenu . yiṭhītala yibhūrāhimu pāduśahā voḍi
yala putṛṁḍu mahammadukullīpādaśaha voḍayaluṁgāru kritamijayisanasālu
paṭṭābhiṣiktuṁ ḍai rājyaṁ patipāliṁstunnu vuṁḍḍaṁgāsu kharasaṁva
tsaraṁlōnu ballērāyaṁḍu sābājī Ālamakhānuṁḍu khānakhānu modalainavārunnu
pāyakaṭṭu doralunnu tirugāṁbaḍi harāṁkhōrlai koṁḍḍavīṭiśīmalōnu vuṁ
ḍaṁgānu hajarati pāduśaha voḍayaluṁgāru tama paṭṭānaku pradhāni Ayina malka Ami
laṁ śalavu Icci yītirugaṁbaḍḍa harāṁkhōrlanu daṁḍiṁci śīma kuduruparaci
rammani śalavu dayacēstēnu Ālāgē rājuṁgāri Ānatikramāna malkavoḍayaluṁ
gāru gōlakoṁḍḍa peḷli vacce nanna khaburu vini yīharāṁkhōrlu Aina vāṁḍlu Aṁdda runnu sūryō
dayaṁ AItēnu cīṁkaṭlu viccipōyinaṭṭe yakkaḍivāṁḍlu Akkaḍanē yadāyada lai pāri
pōyiri malkavoḍayalugārunnu kriṣṇa dāṁṭi śīmalōki vijayaṁ cēśi duṣṭa
nigrahaṁ sēsi pratipālanacēśi harāṁkhōrlu Ayinavāṁḍla nellānu Ājñalucēśi
Digital edition of SII 10.751 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
